name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Go
      uses: actions/setup-go@v4
      with:
        go-version: '1.26.0'

    - name: Build
      run: go build -v ./...

    - name: Test
      run: go test -v ./...

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-test
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
    - name: Build the Docker image
      run: docker build . --file Dockerfile --tag flowforge:$(date +%s)
